title: Method and apparatus for classification of wafer defect patterns as well as storage medium and electronic device
abstract: This disclosure relates to a method for classification of wafer defect patterns, and an apparatus, a storage medium, and an electronic device thereof. The method may include obtaining wafer images with labeled defect positions, obtaining a trained convolutional neural network (CNN) and a trained auto-encoder, obtaining feature data of the wafer images by extracting features from the wafer images with the trained CNN, generating feature codes of the wafer images by encoding the feature data of the wafer images with the trained auto-encoder, and clustering feature codes of a plurality of wafer images with labelled defect positions, and performing defect pattern classification on the respective wafer images based on a result of the clustering. Accordingly, amount and cost of labor can be greatly reduced, classification efficiency and accuracy can be significantly increased, and ability of processing massive data can be archived by directly coupling to an EDA system.
claims: Claims ( 14 ) AĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â classificationĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â defectĂ‚Â patterns,Ă‚Â comprising: obtainingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â trainedĂ‚Â convolutionalĂ‚Â neuralĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â (CNN)Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â trainedĂ‚Â auto-encoder; acquiringĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â labelledĂ‚Â defectĂ‚Â position; obtainingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â datumĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â extractingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â trainedĂ‚Â CNN; generatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â codeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â encodingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â datumĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â trainedĂ‚Â auto-encoder;Ă‚Â and clusteringĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â codesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imagesĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â labelledĂ‚Â defectĂ‚Â position,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â performingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â defectĂ‚Â patternĂ‚Â classificationĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â respectiveĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imagesĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â resultĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â clustering. TheĂ‚Â methodĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â claimĂ‚Â 1,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â clusteringĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â codesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imagesĂ‚Â andĂ‚Â performingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â defectĂ‚Â patternĂ‚Â classificationĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â respectiveĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imagesĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â resultĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â clusteringĂ‚Â comprises: obtainingĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â classĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â clusteringĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â codesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â images;Ă‚Â and performingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â defectĂ‚Â patternĂ‚Â classificationĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â respectiveĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imagesĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â atĂ‚Â leastĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â class,Ă‚Â whereinĂ‚Â eachĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â classĂ‚Â correspondsĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â respectiveĂ‚Â oneĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â defectĂ‚Â patterns. AnĂ‚Â electronicĂ‚Â device,Ă‚Â comprising: aĂ‚Â processor;Ă‚Â and aĂ‚Â memoryĂ‚Â deviceĂ‚Â forĂ‚Â storingĂ‚Â anĂ‚Â instructionĂ‚Â executableĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â processor, whereinĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â processorĂ‚Â isĂ‚Â configuredĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â executeĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â executableĂ‚Â instructionĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â causeĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â processorĂ‚Â toĂ‚Â performĂ‚Â operationsĂ‚Â including: obtainingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â trainedĂ‚Â convolutionalĂ‚Â neuralĂ‚Â networkĂ‚Â (CNN)Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â trainedĂ‚Â auto-encoder; acquiringĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â labelingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â defectĂ‚Â position; obtainingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â datumĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â extractingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â fromĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â trainedĂ‚Â CNN; generatingĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â codeĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â byĂ‚Â encodingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â datumĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imageĂ‚Â withĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â trainedĂ‚Â auto-encoder;Ă‚Â and clusteringĂ‚Â featureĂ‚Â codesĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â pluralityĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â images,Ă‚Â andĂ‚Â performingĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â defectĂ‚Â patternĂ‚Â classificationĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â respectiveĂ‚Â waferĂ‚Â imagesĂ‚Â basedĂ‚Â onĂ‚Â aĂ‚Â resultĂ‚Â ofĂ‚Â theĂ‚Â clustering.
